top_candidates.reasoning: The engineering layer's specific signatures — the two negations (no abhikrama-nāśa / no pratyavāya), the explicit contrast structure (unlike agriculture / unlike medical treatment / unlike ritual), the 'svalpam api' partial-application claim, the 'mahato bhayāt' rescue — uniquely match 2.40's nehābhikrama-nāśo 'sti pratyavāyo na vidyate svalpam apy asya dharmasya trāyate mahato bhayāt. The chaos-drill / fruit-attached-feature contrast is the engineering analog of the agriculture-or-ritual / karma-yoga contrast. The narrow restriction of 'asya dharmasya' to karma-yoga specifically is preserved.
Cousin verse on yoga-not-lost; same family but 6.40 is about the failed yogi, while 2.40 is about the safety properties of the discipline.
Doctrinal substrate of karma-yoga; 2.47 is the doctrine, 2.40 names the doctrine's safety properties.
